title: dianthus mazanderanicus
intro: Dianthus mazanderanicus, also known as Mazanderani pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus mazanderanicus include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions made from its roots, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
